notes:
iCIMS login page at careers-exeloncorp.icims.com triggered an interactive hCaptcha challenge (iframe height=570, title='hCaptcha challenge') when the email form was submitted. The h-captcha-response field is empty and the form will not advance without a valid captcha token. This is a physical interactive captcha requiring human intervention.

All form fields were pre-filled: email=jamiecheng0103@gmail.com, GDPR checkbox=checked. The Chrome tab is left open at the login page (port 9422). Screenshot saved: _captcha_challenge.png shows the current state.

Technical notes from this session:
- SOLVED: icimsCookiesEnabledCheck cookie fix (fix_cookie_check() in exelon_submit_v7.py)
- SOLVED: passive hCaptcha detection (height=0) on candidate form page is NOT interactive
- SOLVED: iCIMS custom dropdown mechanism (click anchor then li item)
- BLOCKED: Login page hCaptcha is interactive (height=570) -- requires human to solve
- The previous stale JSESSIONID issue required getting a fresh tracking link via the login form, but the login form itself requires interactive captcha to submit

To complete manually:
1. Open Chrome tab on port 9422 (or navigate to https://careers-exeloncorp.icims.com/jobs/29364/talent-transformation-specialist/login?in_iframe=1&hashed=-625888692)
2. Enter email jamiecheng0103@gmail.com, check GDPR box
3. Solve the hCaptcha challenge
4. Check Jamie's Gmail for the iCIMS magic link email
5. Click the tracking link to get a fresh session
6. Resume the application form (Steps 1-3)
7. When uploading resume on Step 1, wait 12+ seconds after upload for AJAX to complete
